name: Bay Tennis & Fitness Club
description: Bay Tennis & Fitness Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harbor Springs, MI. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Bay View Association - Woods courts
description: Come play pickleball at Bay View Association - Woods courts in Pellston, MI! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Birchwood Farm Golf & Country Club
description: Birchwood Farm Golf & Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harbor Springs, MI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, food, and trainers or lessons.

name: Country Club of Boyne
description: Come play pickleball at Country Club of Boyne in Harbor Springs, MI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: Harbor Springs Sk8 Park
description: Come play pickleball at Harbor Springs Sk8 Park in Harbor Springs, MI! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Mackinaw public tennis courts
description: Mackinaw public tennis courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mackinaw City, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mackinaw Recreation Center
description: Mackinaw Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mackinaw City, MI. There are 3 indoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — You can purchase a membership at Village Hall. Daily and weekly passes are available for purchase.

name: Orthosport Training And Wellness Center
description: Orthosport Training And Wellness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harbor Springs, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Petoskey High School - Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Petoskey High School - Tennis Courts in Petoskey, MI! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Riverbend Park in Petoskey
description: Riverbend Park in Petoskey is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Petoskey, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Student And Community Resource Center, North Central Michigan College
description: Student And Community Resource Center, North Central Michigan College is a place to play pickleball in Petoskey, MI. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Water Street Condominium Association
description: Come play pickleball at Water Street Condominium Association in Petoskey, MI! There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net.
